name: Char-Grilled Kangaroo Kebabs & Smoked Eggplant Puree
recipeIngredient: 600 g Kangaroo fillet, trimmed and cubed
2 teaspoons Coriander seeds, roasted and ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll the cubes of kangaroo meat in the ground coriander seed and black pepper, coating lightly.
2. Skewer the meat pieces and place on an oiled tray before cooking.
3. Grill the eggplants until their skins are blackened and blistered. Allow them to cool slightly, then peel while still warm, removing the bitter juices.
4. Mash the eggplant flesh with a large fork, gradually adding garlic, lemon juice, tahini, sea salt, parsley, and yoghurt.
5. Grill the kebabs under (or over) high heat, brushing with oil to keep moist; avoid toughening the meat.
6. Spoon the eggplant puree onto plates. Remove the skewers and arrange the meat cubes on top of the puree.
7. Serve immediately.
